jobs.title: Excavator Driver in Espoo
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.

jobs.description: We are seeking an excavator driver for municipal engineering projects in Espoo. Previous experience with a wheelbase excavator and 3-D control system management is required.
what_we_expect: Previous experience with a wheelbase excavator
Smooth cooperation with the other working group
job_responsibilities: Excavation work on municipal engineering projects in Espoo
Work independently and smoothly as part of a team
what_we_offer: Interesting job opportunity for local technology worksites
Long-term project in a well-defined and responsible role
Professional working environment with trust, quality, and genuine partnership
who_is_this_for: Excavator drivers interested in municipal engineering projects
Municipal engineers looking for new opportunities
jobs.search_keywords: excavator driver Espoo, excavator driver municipal engineering, municipal engineer job

jobs.title: Cook Youth Centre Piispalu to Kannonkoski
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.description: The Bishop is Finland's largest youth centre located in the middle of Finland, offering delicious and healthy food for guests and staff. The position requires a professional chef with experience and good communication skills.
what_we_expect: training or solid experience in the field of chef's work
job_responsibilities: prepare meals for guests and staff
work at busy times with up to 400 people at lunch
what_we_offer: great food benefit in the restaurant of Piispala and leisure period
opportunity to engage in varied indoor and outdoor sports
who_is_this_for: professional chefs looking for a challenging position in a beautiful location

jobs.title: Bar Waiter, Hemingway's Turku
jobs.salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobs.meta_description: Bar Waiter, Hemingway's Turku at Tehoa Henkilöstöpalvelut Oy in Turku. Explore this opportunity in Finland.
jobs.description: Interested in whiskey and beer? We're looking for a skilled bar waiter to help elevate our restaurant.
what_we_expect: Previous experience in bar serving and cashwork is considered to be of great benefit.
Genuine interest, burning desire to learn new and the ability to recommend products to customers is essential.
job_responsibilities: Free hands: You will have relatively free hands to plan and develop both our whiskey and beer range. You can take advantage of your own expertise and vision of what Turku's best whiskey list and the most interesting beer app look like.
Hours of work: We offer work at least 90 hours / 3 weeks
what_we_offer: Free hands to plan and develop both our whiskey and beer range. You can take advantage of your own expertise and vision of what Turku's best whiskey list and the most interesting beer app look like.
Hours of work at least 90 hours / 3 weeks
who_is_this_for: Genuine interest in whiskey and beer, previous experience in bar serving and cashwork is considered to be of great benefit.
jobs.search_keywords: bar waiter, Hemingway's Turku, skilled bartender, bar service, restaurant management
